revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cleanup_lang here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Ambox | name = Cleanup-lang | subst = {{subst:substcheck}} | small = {{{small|}}} | type = style | image = | issue = This {{{1|article}}} should '''specify the language''' of its non-English content, using {{tl|langx}}, {{tl|transliteration}} for transliterated languages, and {{tl|IPA}} for phonetic transcriptions, with an appropriate [[:en:Lists of ISO 639 codes|ISO 639 code]]. Wikipedia's [[:Category:Wikipedia multilingual support templates|multilingual support templates]] may also be used{{#if:{{{iso|}}}| - notably {{{iso}}} for {{ISO 639 name|{{{iso}}}}}.|.{{category handler|all=|nocat={{{nocat|}}}}}}} | fix = [[Template:Lang#Rationale|See why]]. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = {{category handler|all=Pages with non-English text lacking appropriate markup|nocat={{{nocat|}}}}} }} }} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with non-English text lacking appropriate markup and no ISO hint]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
